parameters.command: =CONTENT_DIR="{{ $json.contentDir }}"; if [ -z "$CONTENT_DIR" ] || [ "$CONTENT_DIR" = "undefined" ]; then echo '{"success":false,"error":"contentDir 未提供，请在请求体中传入包含图片的目录路径（如 ~/.xiaohongshu-queue/2026-03-10/image-1）"}'; else NODE_PATH=/Users/administrator/perfect21/cecelia/node_modules node ~/perfect21/cecelia/packages/workflows/skills/xiaohongshu-publisher/scripts/publish-xiaohongshu-image.cjs --content "$CONTENT_DIR" 2>&1 && echo '{"success":true}' || echo '{"success":false,"error":"发布脚本返回非零退出码，请查看截图目录"}'; fi

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { feishuBody: { msg_type: 'text', content: { text: '⏭️ 发布跳过\n原因: ' + prev.reason } } } }];
